title: HexConnect
description: A mod which allows *some* Fabric Hex Casting addons to be loaded on Forge.
body:
## About
HexConnect is an addon for [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) that applies a number of fixes which enable some Fabric-only Hex Casting addons to actually load on Forge when using [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector). 

Please note that currently this mod is just focused on getting Fabric addons past the loading stage on Forge, and that **I cannot guarantee 100% functionality or stability for every addon**. For this reason, please be very diligent when reporting any bugs to mod authors by making sure you verify that the issue occurs in a barebones instance without HexConnect installed, as HexConnect may potentially cause issues.

## Usage
To start using HexConnect, ensure that [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), [Connector Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector-extras), the Forge version of [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting), [Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api), and all their dependencies are installed.

From there, depending on the addons you are wanting to use, you also may need to install the Forge version of [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) and [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) (and yes, that means you would have both Fabric Language Kotlin AND Kotlin for Forge because of Hex Casting's dependencies).

Some addons also depend on MoreIotas, and possibly also Hexal (which in it self depends on Geckolib). You can get MoreIotas under its Github page's releases tab [here](https://github.com/FallingColors/MoreIotas/releases/tag/0.1.0-5). The working Hexal build can be downloaded [here](https://limbo.skye.vg/hexal/hexal-forge-1.20.1-0.3.0-3-skyevg-unofficial.jar) (same link as the one pinned in the Hex Casting Discord). Geckolib can be found on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib). Make sure that they are all their respective Forge versions.

Lastly, refer to the section below for what Fabric addons you can install.

## Support
Below is a list of the Fabric Hex Casting addons that I have tested and confirmed that I could load on Forge when following the steps described above. I have linked the Modrinth page along with the version which I tested for each addon that is available on Modrinth. Additionally, the Hexxy4 modpack has some addons (or newer versions of some addons) which are not currently available on Modrinth, but can be downloaded off of the [Hexxy4 Github page](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/tree/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2). For these addons I've also included a link to their respective files as of commit ```3df1c1a```, as I have also tested and confirmed that the versions available as of commit ```3df1c1a``` also load on Forge.

As addons are updated, changes made might break their support for being loaded on Forge, however you can always experiment with newer versions as you wish and see if they still work. This list also might not cover every addon that works with HexConnect, so again, feel free to test addons not on this list.

- Complex Hex - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/complex-hex) 0.1.3-beta / [Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/complexhex-fabric-1.20.1-0.1.6-beta.jar))
- Efhexs - ([Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/efhexs-1.0.0.jar))
- Ephemera - ([Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/ephemera-fabric-1.20.1-0.3.0.jar))
- Hex Machina - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-machina) 1.0.1)
- Hex Pigment Plus - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexpigmentplus) 1.7.1)
- Hexcassettes - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexcassettes) 1.1.4 / [Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/hexcassettes-2.0.0.jar))
- Hexcasting Media Display - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexcasting-media-display) 1.1.0)
- Hexcellular - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexcellular) 1.0.4 / [Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/hexcellular-1.1.0.jar))
- Hexchanting - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexchanting) 1.1.3)
- Hexical - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexical) 1.5.0 / [Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/hexical-2.0.0.jar))
- Hexportation - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexportation) 0.0.3)
- Hexpose - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexpose) 1.0.0)
- HexStruction - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexstruction) 1.2.1+1.20.1)
- Hextended Staves - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hextended-staves) 2.0.1)
- Hexthingy - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexthingy) 1.0.1)
- Lapisworks - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/lapisworks) 1.5.1.5)
- Lesser Teleport - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/lesser-teleport) 1.2.1)
- Overevaluate - ([Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/overevaluate-1.0.0.jar))
- Phlexiful - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/phlexiful) 1.0.0)
- Scryglass - ([Hexxy4](https://github.com/ChloeTax/hexxy4/blob/3df1c1a19c3e3659f532d54d9852294734be89c2/mods/scryglass-1.0.0.jar))
- Slate Works - ([Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/slate-works) 1.0.3)
- _Heartxxy_ - (Just use the Forge version available on the [Heartxxy Github releases page](https://github.com/SoccyUwU/heartxxy/releases/tag/v0.1.0+1.20.1))


## Credits
HexConnect is made possible by everyone who has helped develop and bring to life both Hex Casting and Sinytra Connector. HexConnect also is nothing without all the addons which the community has created, so credit to all the addon devs as well.

Part of Hex Casting's Fabric side api is packaged in with HexConnect to ideally make things work, and all that code is provided under the [MIT license](https://github.com/FallingColors/HexMod/blob/main/LICENSE.txt).

Additionally a modified (and version bumped for priority) version of serialization-hooks for 1.20.1 is also embedded, again provided under the [MIT license](https://github.com/Talia-12/serialization-hooks/blob/1.20.1/LICENSE).
